productDisplayName: Free Authority Men's Don't Stop Can't Stop Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and grunge look chest print FittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours only Use non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Do not iron if decorated Do not dry clean if decorated Get ready to rock all night with this grey free authority t-shirt. The grunge look graphic on the front pays tribute to all rock lovers and the words "Don't stop, can't stop" only amplifies the effect. Team this tee with denims and canvas shoes for outings with friends or for a wild time at the concerts.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
